summary: CP for SpaceX refueling question has been at exactly 0.40 for 5+ days, threshold is strictly > 0.40
content: Key findings: CP history shows downward drift from 0.60s (late Dec) -> 0.42 (late Jan) -> 0.40 (Feb 12-17). Currently at exactly 0.40, which resolves NO. 739 forecasters (large, stable). The CP dipped to 0.35 in Feb 8-10 but recovered. No major SpaceX events expected before Feb 26 (Flight 12 is early March). The CP needs to move strictly above 0.40 to resolve YES.
